Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.date

Class SolarCoords

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.date.SolarCoords
public class SolarCoords extends Object
Solar coordinates and related values.

  • Constructor Details

    • SolarCoords

      public SolarCoords(double ra, double dec, double apparentRA, double apparentDec, double Lo, double M, double C)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      ra - The Sun's RA in decimal degrees.
      dec - The Sun's declination in decimal degrees.
      apparentRA - The Sun's apparent RA in decimal degrees.
      apparentDec - The Sun's apparent declination in decimal degrees.
      Lo - Geometric mean longitude of the Sun.
      M - The true solar anomaly.
      C - The Sun's equation of center.

  • Method Details

    • getRA

      public double getRA()
      Returns:
      the Sun's right ascension in decimal degrees.

    • getDec

      public double getDec()
      Returns:
      the Sun's declination in decimal degrees.

    • getApparentRA

      public double getApparentRA()
      Returns:
      the Sun's apparent right ascension in decimal degrees.

    • getApparentDec

      public double getApparentDec()
      Returns:
      the Sun's apparent declination in decimal degrees.

    • getGeometricMeanLongitude

      public double getGeometricMeanLongitude()
      Returns:
      the Sun's geometric mean longitude in radians.

    • getTrueAnomaly

      public double getTrueAnomaly()
      Returns:
      the Sun's true anomaly in radians.

    • getEquationOfCenter

      public double getEquationOfCenter()
      Returns:
      the Sun's equation of center in radians.
